title: selaginella achotalensis
intro: Selaginella achotalensis is a species of plant in the genus Selaginella, which is a type of ancient, vascular plant commonly known as spike moss. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella achotalensis include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Selaginella achotalensis can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
